overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a player driving through a desert wasteland toward the futuristic Night City skyline. The vehicle navigates paved highways and dirt paths, passing abandoned structures, satellite dishes, and a waterfront area before continuing toward the urban center.

agents.ego_description: driving steadily along the desert highway toward the distant city skyline

entered.detail: tall futuristic skyscrapers with distinctive architecture visible on the horizon
arid wasteland with dry grass and dirt extending to the horizon
scattered desert vegetation including yucca trees and shrubs
utility poles with wires running parallel to the road
large abandoned satellite dishes scattered across the desert landscape

segments.scene_description: The segment opens with a first-person driving view through a sunlit desert wasteland. The futuristic city skyline looms in the far distance while satellite dishes and Joshua trees dot the arid landscape. The vehicle travels steadily along a paved road with power lines running parallel on the right.

scene_state.functional_zone: abandoned gas station and waterfront approach

events.description: passing abandoned gas station structures on the right side of the road

agents.ego_description: continuing along the road past industrial ruins toward the waterfront area

entered.detail: derelict fuel station with broken canopy and weathered walls
makeshift wooden structures and shacks along the water's edge
calm lake or reservoir reflecting the sky, bordered by reeds
rusted cars and debris scattered near the shacks

segments.scene_description: The vehicle passes an abandoned gas station on the right and approaches a waterfront area with makeshift shacks. The body of water becomes visible ahead, reflecting the clear sky, while abandoned vehicles and debris litter the shoreline. The futuristic city remains visible in the far distance.

events.description: vehicle slows and executes a U-turn at the waterfront dead end

agents.ego_description: maneuvering the vehicle in a tight turn to reverse direction at the waterfront

segments.scene_description: The vehicle reaches the waterfront and executes a U-turn on the dirt ground near the shacks. The body of water shifts from the center to the left side of the frame as the car turns around. The abandoned structures are left behind as the vehicle faces back toward the desert road.

agents.ego_description: accelerating along the desert highway toward the city, passing rocky outcrops

entered.detail: reddish-brown rock formations and cliffs lining the right side of the road
large advertising billboard with yellow and black graphics

segments.scene_description: The vehicle drives away from the waterfront along a paved desert highway. Rocky hills rise on the right while satellite dishes dot the left landscape. The futuristic city skyline appears noticeably closer and larger in the center of the view as the journey continues.

events.description: passing under concrete overpass structure as city approaches

agents.ego_description: speeding along the final stretch of highway with the city skyline dominating the view

entered.detail: large warehouse and factory structures at the city outskirts
concrete highway overpass and support columns
steep rock face cutting alongside the highway

segments.scene_description: The final segment shows the highway approaching the massive futuristic city, with skyscrapers now filling the center view. The vehicle passes industrial buildings and under a concrete overpass. The desert terrain gives way to urban infrastructure as rocky cliffs press close to the right side of the road.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person driving perspective through a sunlit desert wasteland that leads toward a distant futuristic skyline before looping back. It begins on a paved road flanked by power lines, passing through an arid landscape dotted with Joshua trees and satellite dishes. As the vehicle progresses, the scene shifts toward a waterfront area where an abandoned gas station gives way to makeshift shacks and debris-strewn shorelines reflecting a clear sky. The camera then follows the vehicle as it reaches the water's edge and executes a U-turn on the dirt ground, causing the shoreline to shift to the left of the frame. Finally, the movement turns away from the coastal structures to face back toward the open desert road.

The shot follows a continuous drive from a desolate desert wasteland toward the towering urban expanse of a futuristic city. It begins on a paved highway moving away from the waterfront, with rocky hills on the right and satellite dishes scattered across the left landscape. As the vehicle advances, the distant city skyline grows noticeably larger and more imposing in the center of the view. The scene then shifts as the desert terrain gives way to urban infrastructure, passing industrial buildings and gliding under a concrete overpass. Finally, the road presses close against rocky cliffs before the massive skyscrapers fully dominate the horizon.
